creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Christer,

thanks for submitting this update, however the patch applies to 
py-salt-cloud version 0.8.5 whereas we only have version 0.8.4 in
the ports tree.

Could you please check your patch and try to apply it on a clean
checkout of the current tree?

Thanks for your help Christer!

Regards,
Frederic (culot@)
